channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 3.0.0-rc1 2019-09-28T18:45:59Z Features/Updates: Layout Builder off canvas fixes Duplicate title logic for Layout Builder Fixes to Entity View Display calling wrong title Claro backend theme enabled by default Homepage CSS fixes for padding issue Addition of Core Context for Layout Builder Upgrade path:
